response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in developing AI-driven solutions and working with cloud platforms, but lacks direct experience with some key technologies like vector databases and RAG architectures.
strengths: 8+ years of experience developing AI-driven solutions
Proven ability to lead technical discovery sessions
Experience with TypeScript and cloud platforms
concerns: No direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
No explicit mention of experience with LLM performance metrics or optimization
No experience with multi-agent system frameworks mentioned

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience with key technologies
Strong background in software development and cloud platforms
